masters.name: Kai Sparks
masters.title: The Rookie Wrecker
masters.dialog_intro: Hey, new kid! Think you can hang with the big dogs? Let's see what you got!
masters.dialog_win: Not bad... not bad at all. You earned that one.
masters.dialog_lose: Ha! Come back when you've learned to launch properly!

masters.name: Mira Tidewell
masters.title: The Steady Flow
masters.dialog_intro: Patience wins battles. Can you outlast my Shark Edge?
masters.dialog_win: You read the flow perfectly. I respect that.
masters.dialog_lose: The tide always wins. You just ran out of spin.

masters.name: Gordo Stonewall
masters.title: The Immovable
masters.dialog_intro: I don't move. I don't flinch. And I definitely don't lose.
masters.dialog_win: Impossible... you broke through my wall?!
masters.dialog_lose: Told ya. Hit me all day. I'm not going anywhere.

masters.name: Zephyr Kaze
masters.title: The Storm Chaser
masters.dialog_intro: Can you even see me? I'm already three moves ahead.
masters.dialog_win: Whoa... you kept up with my speed? Color me impressed.
masters.dialog_lose: Blink and you missed it. That's how fast I am.

masters.name: Voltaire Ohm
masters.title: The Live Wire
masters.dialog_intro: I calculate every possibility before the match starts. You've already lost.
masters.dialog_win: A variable I didn't account for. Fascinating.
masters.dialog_lose: As predicted. The math was never in your favor.

masters.name: Yuki Frostblade
masters.title: The Frozen Calm
masters.dialog_intro: Stay calm. Stay cold. The one who panics loses first.
masters.dialog_win: Your fire was enough to melt my frost. Well played.
masters.dialog_lose: The cold doesn't rush. It just waits until you stop spinning.

masters.name: Rex Dreadmaw
masters.title: The Shadow Fang
masters.dialog_intro: They call me the Shadow Fang for a reason. You won't see the hit coming.
masters.dialog_win: Tch. You got lucky. Next time, the shadow bites back.
masters.dialog_lose: Darkness always wins. You just can't fight what you can't see.

masters.name: Sora Luminex
masters.title: The Radiant Blade
masters.dialog_intro: I am the last gate before the Elite. Every Blader who stands here has earned it. But earning it and passing it are different things.
masters.dialog_win: That light in your eyes... you're the real deal. Go. The Elite awaits.
masters.dialog_lose: Close. Really close. But 'close' doesn't open this gate.

elite_challengers.name: Blaze Infernus
elite_challengers.title: Elite Four - The Inferno
elite_challengers.dialog_intro: Welcome to the big leagues, kid. Hope you brought fireproof gloves.
elite_challengers.dialog_win: Burned out... by a newcomer. I'll remember this.
elite_challengers.dialog_lose: Everything burns eventually. You're no exception.

elite_challengers.name: Marina Depthcharge
elite_challengers.title: Elite Four - The Abyss
elite_challengers.dialog_intro: The deeper you go, the more the pressure crushes you. Ready to drown?
elite_challengers.dialog_win: You... surfaced. Nobody surfaces from my abyss.
elite_challengers.dialog_lose: Down you go. The deep doesn't let go.

elite_challengers.name: Gaia Ironroot
elite_challengers.title: Elite Four - The Mountain
elite_challengers.dialog_intro: I am the mountain. You are the wind. Blow all you want.
elite_challengers.dialog_win: The mountain... crumbled? You have the strength of an earthquake.
elite_challengers.dialog_lose: Mountains don't move for anyone. Especially not you.

elite_challengers.name: Raijin Stormclaw
elite_challengers.title: Elite Four - The Tempest
elite_challengers.dialog_intro: I strike once. That's all it takes. One bolt. One burst. Done.
elite_challengers.dialog_win: You... dodged the lightning? Nobody dodges the lightning.
elite_challengers.dialog_lose: Struck down. Don't feel bad. Even the sky fears the storm.

champion.name: Ryuga Xero
champion.title: Hometown Champion - The Xtreme
champion.dialog_intro: So you beat the Elite Four. Impressive. But I'm not the Elite Four. I'm the reason they exist. Let me show you why they call this the Xtreme.
champion.dialog_win: Ha... HAHA! Finally! Someone who can actually push me! You've earned this crown. But don't get comfortable. I'll be taking it back.
champion.dialog_lose: That's the difference between talent and mastery. Come back stronger. I'll be waiting.
